product.product_description: The TopShield Aluminum Offset Ledge Jumper is a versatile solution for extending your downspout outward, particularly when faced with obstacles such as ledges on your wall. Offered in both type A and B, these jumpers play a crucial role in connecting the downspout to the gutter in situations where space is limited for two elbows.

product.product_description: The TopShield Aluminum Box Miter is a purposeful solution crafted to seamlessly connect two sections of a gutter, creating a precise 90-degree corner where needed. Available in both inside and outside configurations, with sizes of 5 inch and 6 inch, this box iter allows for the easy junction of two separate gutters at a right angle.

product.product_name: TopShield Aluminum Outside Bay Strip Miter
product.product_description: The TopShield Aluminum Bay Strip Miter is a specialized solution designed to accommodate 45-degree angle corners with precision. Available in both inside and outside designs, and sizes ranging from 5 inch to 7 inch, it offers versatility for various applications.

product.product_description: Hidden Hangers are the modern equipment used for mounting and/or hanging gutters. They are basically a gutter bracket that clips to the inside of the gutter and screws directly into the fascia board with a steel threaded screw. The name “hidden hanger” comes from the fact that you can’t see the brackets from the ground because they no longer pierce the gutter face like traditional gutter spikes did.

product.product_name: GAF Master Flow RV50G Galvanized Square Vent
product.product_description: Helps exhaust heat and moisture from the attic, kitchen or bathroom, to protect from premature deterioration, decrease interior heat, and limit the growth of harmful mold and mildew. This vent provides 50 sq. in. (32,258 m2) of NFA.

option_values.option_value: Black — 15" x 16 1/2" x 4" Square Top/Round Throat
Brown — 15" x 16 1/2" x 4" Square Top/Round Throat
Weathered Wood — 15" x 16 1/2" x 4" Round Throat
Weathered Wood — 15" x 16 1/2" x 4" Square Top/Round Throat

product.product_description: The original Cobra ridge vent, protecting over 2 million homes, comes on a mesh roll for fast and easy installation with no complicated fitting, wrapping, nail gun adapters, connectors or end plugs needed. It features a shingle over design to help blend into the ridge line.

product.product_name: GAF Master Flow Galvanized Gooseneck Vent
product.product_description: Master Flow galvanized goose neck vents are used for attic ventilation or to cover an exhaust pipe through a roof. This vent is made with 26 ga galvanized steel, features a heavy-duty screen to deter entry by birds or small animals.

product.product_name: GAF Master Flow Galvanized Externally Braced Turbine
product.product_description: 12" (305 mm) galvanized turbine with stainless dual-bearing system uses the wind to pull heat and moisture from the attic systems for extra durability.

product.product_name: GAF Master Flow Galvanized Chimney Cap
product.product_description: Easy-to-install galvanized steel chimney caps with epoxy coating help protect against weather infiltration, downdrafts, clogging, and animal infestation.

product.product_description: Well-suited to smaller gables, the arch makes the most of the space and accentuates the height of the gable. If you would like to add a keystone, sold separately, it can be easily adapted to fit. Use with a wide range of siding materials.
